message:
✨ Failover accept/reject UI, scrollable dialog, audio on switch (#68)

- Accept (green ✓) / reject (red ✗) buttons on each failover alternative
- Save persists: accepted channels get same vanity name, rejected stored separately
- Reset button clears rejections and re-discovers all alternatives
- Dialog now scrollable (ListView) with larger max size (0.85) to prevent overflow
- Ensure volume set to 100% on auto-failover stream switch
- Failover Group count shows only accepted alternatives

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
